name: Ragatha - A little glitch
description:
"With my last breath I curse that damn glitch!"

It's been two weeks since the censorship was lifted at the Circus, enough time for some to get used to the changes in their bodies, while others (Gangle and Zooble) immediately began exploring the possibilities. Ragatha? She's just processing it.

Sure, the shock has worn off, but she can handle it. Of course, it doesn't help that a glitch in the Circus's system caused her dress to disappear... how wonderful fate is.

✨

creator: Olaqase
